reviews.author: 32 MARIYA IRFAN 1361
reviews.review_body: A student of Presidency Girls High School. Batch ( 2021-22 ). The teachers are well experienced. There's a proper staff management. Classes are neat n tidy. School floors, washrooms are hygeine. Gives response to every child in the class. Conduct all types of activities: drawing competition, essay writing competition and games competition etc. Appreciates students for their inner talent by giving prizes. All types of festivals gets celebrate by putting all the efforts. Makes our grammer skills perfect. As student reaches to a 10th standard we get teachers who are highly experienced, improves the IQ level of a student. Try to make them perfect for final boards. Explanations of teachers are at next level. Gives proper notes for every chapter. A very strict school when comes to studies. Decipline is maintained by all staff members and students. A best school for all girls. Urdu teachers also teaches us about the history of Islam. Good luck for all the new comers. MARIYA IRFAN .
